body: This PR updates ClimaAtmos to using CloudMicrophysics v0.23. This was a breaking change release for CM.jl because the API for  `conv_q_ice_to_q_sno` and `evaporation_sublimation` was changed.
title: Update to CloudMicrophysics v0.23

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
Adds docstrings to prognostic EDMF equations & forcing files; cleanup of logic in a few places; more consistent naming. 

Summary of Changes: 

1. Added comprehensive docstrings throughout prognostic equations modules for EDMF
2. Renamed edmf_coriolis → scm_coriolis,  remove redundant coordinate transformations in the cross product [behavior change]
3. Renamed horizontal_advection → horizontal_dynamics
4. Cleaned up entrainment/detrainment code, entr/detr only for updraft area above eps(FT)  [behavior change]
5. Split gradient Richardson number calculation into separate functions
6. Fixed hard-coded thermodynamic values

## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->
- [x] Rebase after #3824 
- [x] Test
- [x] Stable with diagnostic EDMF AMIP nightly run [`amip_target_diagedmf.yml`]  

## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->

title: Docstrings in prognostic_equations
